data.title: Mountain Crest Acquisition 6 Corp. Announces Pricing of $60 Million Initial Public Offering
data.description: On April 29, 2026, Mountain Crest Acquisition 6 Corp. announced the pricing of its initial public offering of 6,000,000 units at $10.00 per unit. Each unit comprises one ordinary share and one right, with each right entitling the holder to receive one-fourth of one ordinary share post the Company’s initial business combination. The units are set to trade on the Nasdaq Global Market under the ticker symbol “MCAHU” from April 30, 2026. Following the separation of the units, the ordinary shares and rights will trade on Nasdaq as “MCAH” and “MCAHR,” respectively.

data.title: PACSUN HOSTS CO-CREATED LOCKER ROOM EVENT WITH THE LOS ANGELES RAMS
data.description: An exclusive event was held on Friday, April 29, 2026, in Los Angeles to celebrate Pacsun's partnership with the Los Angeles Rams at SoFi Stadium. Pacsun, a specialty fashion retailer focused on youth culture, organized the behind-the-scenes experience at the stadium. The event highlighted the longstanding partnership between Pacsun and the Rams.

data.title: DEFSEC Ships New BLISS ("Battlespace Laser Identification Sensor System") To U.S. Army Yuma Test Center
data.description: Today, DEFSEC Technologies Inc. disclosed that they have sent out two recently developed BLISSTM systems to the United States Army Yuma Test Center. The devices were shipped to the testing center located in the United States. DEFSEC is listed on the Toronto Stock Exchange under "DFSC" and "DFSC.WT.U," as well as on the NASDAQ under "DFSC" and "DFSCW."

data.title: Board Declares Quarterly Dividend
data.description: In Westminster, Colorado, on April 29, 2026, Ball Corporation's board of directors (NYSE: BALL) announced a cash dividend of 20 cents per share. This dividend is set to be paid on June 15, 2026, to shareholders who are on record as of June 1, 2026. Additionally, Ball Corporation will provide further details on a conference call scheduled for a future date.

data.title: Cohen & Steers Closed-End Opportunity Fund, Inc. (FOF) Notification of Sources of Distribution Under Section 19(a)
data.description: On April 29, 2026, a press release was issued for shareholders of Cohen & Steers Closed-End Opportunity Fund, Inc. (NYSE: FOF) detailing the sources of the forthcoming distribution scheduled for April 30, 2026. This update also included data on cumulative distributions paid for the fiscal year.

data.title: Healthcare IT Leaders Gave Themselves a Perfect Breach Detection Score. 58% of Them Got Breached Anyway, Paubox Finds
data.description: In San Francisco, healthcare IT leaders are showing confidence in their email breach detection capabilities, with a new study from Paubox revealing that in a survey of 170 U.S. healthcare IT leaders, 100% have rated their real-time breach detection as Excellent or Good. However, the study also found that despite this high rating, 58% of organizations in the same sample admitted to experiencing breaches through email in the last two years. These insights are from the Healthcare Email Security Maturity Index 2026 report.

data.title: Pulse Seismic Inc. Announces Voting Results at Shareholders' Annual Meeting
data.description: In Calgary, Alberta, on April 29, 2026, Pulse Seismic Inc. (TSX:PSD) (OTCQX:PLSDF) shared the outcomes of its annual meeting. The voting, which took place in Calgary, resulted in the election of all nominee directors as listed in the Company’s proxy circular dated March 16, 2026. The directors were elected through a ballot voting process.

data.title: Dow Jones Futures: Google, Amazon, Meta, Microsoft Are Big Earnings Movers After Oil Prices Spike, Fed's Powell Stays
data.description: Stock futures experienced a decline following slumps in Amazon, Microsoft, and Meta after their earnings reports, while Google saw an increase. Oil prices saw a significant surge. Federal Reserve Chairman Powell's decision to remain in his position also impacted the market. The Dow Jones futures were influenced by the performance of major companies like Google, Amazon, Meta, and Microsoft, in light of the spike in oil prices and Powell's news.

data.title: Inno Holdings Inc. Announces 1-for-20 Reverse Stock Split in Ongoing Nasdaq Compliance Efforts
data.description: Hong Kong, April 29, 2026 - INNO HOLDINGS INC., a Texas-based holding company and electronic products trading company primarily operating in Hong Kong, announced a 1-for-20 reverse stock split of all its common stock. This decision was approved by the Board of Directors following authorization from the annual stockholders' meeting on March 2, 2026. The company has filed for an amendment to its formation certificate with the Texas Secretary of State to implement the reverse stock split. The effective date for this action is set for May 4, 2026, at 09:30 a.m. Eastern Time.
